app.title: Sudoku
app.subtitle: Classic sudoku and more game modes

game.failedDescription: You reached the limit of {{max}} mistakes.

install.title: Install as app
install.subtitle: Offline, quick launch, no browser chrome

meta.title: Souls shop
meta.subtitle: Spend souls on permanent unlocks for future runs.

rpg.confirmAbandon: Really abandon current run? Progress will be lost.

reward.title: Reward
reward.subtitle: Pick one of three — final choice.

leather_glove.name: Leather Glove
leather_glove.desc: +1 max HP and instant heal by 1.

dragon_scale.name: Dragon Scale
dragon_scale.desc: First mistake each level is forgiven (no HP loss).

phoenix.name: Phoenix
phoenix.desc: Once per run, revives you at 1 HP on death.

silver_chain.name: Silver Chain
silver_chain.desc: +5 max mana and instant restore by 5.

mana_vial.name: Mana Vial
mana_vial.desc: At the start of each level restores 5 mana.

flame_crown.name: Flame Crown
flame_crown.desc: +25% bonus gold for fast level completions (under 3 minutes).

spell_book.name: Spell Book
spell_book.desc: Power-up slots have 2 charges instead of 1.

sharp_eye.name: Sharp Eye
sharp_eye.desc: Peer highlight extends to diagonally adjacent cells.

stone_totem.name: Stone Totem
stone_totem.desc: Chain reaction yields double gold and mana.

shadow.name: Shadow
shadow.desc: Each level starts with 5 lucky cells instead of 3.

blood_altar.name: Blood Altar
blood_altar.desc: Active: sacrifice 1 HP for 50 gold. Usable any time (HP > 1).

golden_pact.name: Golden Pact
golden_pact.desc: +25% gold from all sources, but −1 max HP.

time_dilation.name: Time Dilation
time_dilation.desc: Fast-level threshold extends from 3 to 6 minutes.

warrior.name: Warrior
warrior.desc: Balanced — 3 HP, 10 mana, no starting relic.

mage.name: Mage
mage.desc: Fragile but magical — 2 HP, 20 mana, starts with Mana Vial.

monk.name: Monk
monk.desc: Sturdy but mana-poor — 4 HP, 5 mana, starts with Dragon Scale.

rpg.openMeta: Souls shop — unlock more classes and relics

peek.name: Peek
peek.desc: Reveals the correct value of the selected cell for 3 seconds.

shield.name: Shield
shield.desc: Absorbs the next mistake — no HP loss, combo intact.

swap.name: Swap
swap.desc: Swap values of two cells. (Coming soon.)

luckyCell.label: Lucky cell — correct value rewards gold and mana, wrong costs extra HP.

altar.title: Bloody Altar
altar.desc: Sacrifice {{hp}} HP to gain the relic "{{relic}}".

shop.title: Shop
shop.subtitle: Spend your gold before moving on.

end.winSubtitle: You finished the run and beat the boss.
